name: Create Customer
summary: Create a new customer profile in the Pine Labs payment system.
description: Registers a new customer with billing/shipping addresses, contact details, and optional merchant metadata. Returns the created customer object with a system-generated customer_id.

parameters.name: merchant_metadata
parameters.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for merchant-specific data.

returns.description: The newly created customer object with generated customer_id, timestamps, and status.

errors.description: email_id is not a valid email format.
A required field (first_name, last_name, email_id, mobile_number) is missing.
A customer with the same mobile_number or email_id already exists.
Upstream server returned an unexpected error.

examples.label: Ruby
examples.code:
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'
require 'json'

url = URI("https://pluraluat.v2.pinepg.in/api/v1/customer")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(url)
request["accept"] = 'application/json'
request["content-type"] = 'application/json'
request.body = {
  first_name: "Kevin",
  last_name: "Bob",
  email_id: "kevin.bob@example.com",
  country_code: "91",
  mobile_number: "9876543210"
}.to_json

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body

examples.label: Python
examples.code:
import requests

url = "https://pluraluat.v2.pinepg.in/api/v1/customer"

payload = {
    "first_name": "Kevin",
    "last_name": "Bob",
    "email_id": "kevin.bob@example.com",
    "country_code": "91",
    "mobile_number": "9876543210"
}
headers = {
    "accept": "application/json",
    "content-type": "application/json"
}

response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers)
print(response.json())

examples.label: Node.js
Java
C#
PHP
Go
examples.code:
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	body := []byte(`{
		"first_name": "Kevin",
		"last_name": "Bob",
		"email_id": "kevin.bob@example.com",
		"country_code": "91",
		"mobile_number": "9876543210"
	}`)

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST",
		"https://pluraluat.v2.pinepg.in/api/v1/customer",
		bytes.NewBuffer(body))
	req.Header.Set("accept", "application/json")
	req.Header.Set("content-type", "application/json")

	resp, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	resBody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	fmt.Println(string(resBody))
}
